ai_suggestion: To transition beautifully from Addis Ababas brisk morning to its warm afternoon high of nearly 25 degrees, smart layering is your ultimate style strategy. I recommend wearing breathable cotton trousers with a chic t-shirt, topped with a lightweight knit sweater or a classic denim jacket that you can easily shed as it warms up. Essential additions for your day include a pair of stylish sunglasses to shield you from the high-altitude sun and a light, easily packable scarf. Enjoy your outdoor tasks today, but keep your layers flexible so you stay perfectly comfortable from this cool start through the warm afternoon peak.
